ddls:
CREATE TABLE "plots" (
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plot */,
  "plot_name" TEXT /* Name of the plot */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the plot */,
  "area_hectares" REAL /* Area of the plot in hectares */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil in the plot */,
  "topography" TEXT /* Topography of the plot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spectral_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spectral data entry */,
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated plot */,
  "blue" REAL /* Reflectance value in the Blue band */,
  "green" REAL /* Reflectance value in the Green band */,
  "nir" REAL /* Reflectance value in the NIR band */,
  "red" REAL /* Reflectance value in the Red band */,
  "red_edge" REAL /* Reflectance value in the RedEdge band */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date of data collection */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor used for data collection */,
  "spectral_resolution" TEXT /* Spectral resolution of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spectral_data_plot_id FOREIGN KEY ("plot_id") REFERENCES plots ("plot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vegetation_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vegetation index entry */,
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated plot */,
  "ndvi" REAL /* Normalized Difference Vegetation Index (NDVI) */,
  "evi" REAL /* Enhanced Vegetation Index (EVI) */,
  "gndvi" REAL /* Green Normalized Difference Vegetation Index (GNDVI) */,
  "date_calculated" TEXT /* Date when the index was calculated */,
  "calculation_method" TEXT /* Method used for index calculation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vegetation_indices_plot_id FOREIGN KEY ("plot_id") REFERENCES plots ("plot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, agronomist, data analyst) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., University, Organization) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., Agriculture, Environmental Science) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spectral data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of access (e.g., research, monitoring) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES spectral_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated plot */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during data collection (°C) */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during data collection (%) */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation during data collection (mm) */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed during data collection (m/s) */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date of data collection */,
  "weather_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_plot_id FOREIGN KEY ("plot_id") REFERENCES plots ("plot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_weather_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("weather_station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "weather_station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather station was installed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fertilizer_data" (
  "fertilizer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fertilizer application entry */,
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated plot */,
  "fertilizer_type" TEXT /* Type of fertilizer applied */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the fertilizer was applied */,
  "amount_applied" REAL /* Amount of fertilizer applied (kg) */,
  "application_method" TEXT /* Method of fertilizer application (e.g., broadcast, banding) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fertilizer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fertilizer_data_plot_id FOREIGN KEY ("plot_id") REFERENCES plots ("plot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "irrigation_data" (
  "irrigation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each irrigation entry */,
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated plot */,
  "irrigation_type" TEXT /* Type of irrigation applied (e.g., drip, sprinkler) */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the irrigation was applied */,
  "amount_applied" REAL /* Amount of water applied (liters) */,
  "irrigation_method" TEXT /* Method of irrigation (e.g., automated, manual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("irrigation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_irrigation_data_plot_id FOREIGN KEY ("plot_id") REFERENCES plots ("plot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crop_types" (
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop entry */,
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated plot */,
  "crop_name" TEXT /* Name of the crop planted */,
  "planting_date" TEXT /* Date when the crop was planted */,
  "harvest_date" TEXT /* Date when the crop is expected to be harvested */,
  "crop_variety" TEXT /* Variety of the crop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_types_plot_id FOREIGN KEY ("plot_id") REFERENCES plots ("plot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "field_management" (
  "management_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each management practice entry */,
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated plot */,
  "practice_type" TEXT /* Type of management practice implemented */,
  "practice_date" TEXT /* Date when the practice was implemented */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the management practice */,
  "management_method" TEXT /* Method used for management (e.g., manual, mechanical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("management_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_field_management_plot_id FOREIGN KEY ("plot_id") REFERENCES plots ("plot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pesticide_data" (
  "pesticide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pesticide application entry */,
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated plot */,
  "pesticide_type" TEXT /* Type of pesticide applied */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the pesticide was applied */,
  "amount_applied" REAL /* Amount of pesticide applied (liters) */,
  "application_method" TEXT /* Method of pesticide application (e.g., spraying, granular) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pesticide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pesticide_data_plot_id FOREIGN KEY ("plot_id") REFERENCES plots ("plot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated plot */,
  "yield_estimate" REAL /* Estimated yield of the crop (tons/ha) */,
  "health_score" REAL /* Health score of the crop (scale 1-10) */,
  "calculation_date" TEXT /* Date when metrics were calculated */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., tons/ha, scale 1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_plot_id FOREIGN KEY ("plot_id") REFERENCES plots ("plot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for data collection */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data collected (e.g., spectral, weather) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
